1 (v) to accompany, usually as, [va.] also.    အဲလေဝ်အာအတေံကီု(မ်) (v) I am going too.    အဲအာအတေံဏောၚ်ဗှ်ေလေဝ်အာကီုဟာ (v) I shall be going there, do you want to come too?    ဗှ်ေလေဝ်ဗက်စှ်ေဍုၚ်ဖဴမိဗှ်ေကီုဟာ (v) are you going into town with your mother too? Sometimes opposite. ပုၚ်ဂှ်စွံလဝ်ဇွောံအဲညိကီု လ္ပစဖ္အိုတ်ထောံ(အ်) (v) leave a little rice for me, do not eat it all.
လ္ပစဖ္အိုတ်ထောံ (v) do not eat it all.
လ္ပစဖ္အိုတ်ထောံ (v) do not eat it all.
လ္ပစဖ္အိုတ်ထောံ(အ်) (v) do not eat it all.

English: Do not eat it all.    ပ္ဍဲကွာန်ဏံ ဍေံတံဟွံစွံကွဳပုဟ်ဟာ  do people not have carts in this village?    ဖျေံစွံ  to put down
Original_Definition: 2 စွံ(အ်) (v) to place, put {down}, leave, refrain from removing, to keep, maintain, to abandon, to adopt {attitude}.    အရေဝ်မၞးစွံလဝ်ကၠာ (v) leave off talking for now.    ဣဏံစွံထောံပ္ဍဲဒၞာဲၜိုဟ်ၜိုဟ် (v) put this in a cool place.    ကောန်မၞးစွံလဝ်ကဵုအဲအဏံ (v) leave your boy here with me.    ကၠောန်ကမၠောန်မွဲမွဲမ္ဂး စွံစေတနာခိုဟ်ခိုဟ်တုဲ ကၠောန်ညိ (v) when you undertake any work, make up your mind to do it well, and then do it.    ဆဂးဗီုလဵုအဲဂွံစွံဍေံတံရော (v) but how am I going to find room for them?    ဆောဝ်လံမၞးစွံဘာကဵုကောန်မၞးရော (v) when are you going to send your son to school?    ပုၚ်ဂှ်စွံလဝ် ဇွောံအဲညိကီု လ္ပစဖ္အိုတ်ထောံ (v) leave a little rice for me, do not eat it all.    ပ္ဍဲကွာန်ဏံ ဍေံတံဟွံစွံကွဳပုဟ်ဟာ (v) do people not have carts in this village?    ဖျေံစွံ (v) to put down, leave. [Cf.] သှ်ောစွံ (v) to take off {clothes}. [id] သှ်စွံ(အ်)။    လ္ပစွံမာနလ္တူညးဂမၠိုၚ် (v) do not think yourself better than others.    လ္ပစွံလဝ်ဍေံပ္ဍဲသ္ၚိညးမွဲဓဝ် (v) do not leave him in the house by himself.    ၝဏံစွံလဝ်သာ်ဏံဟွံဂွံ ဒးမံၚ်ဘာဏောၚ် (v) I cannot keep this rascal here like this, he will have to go to school. [Cf.] ဂၠ၊ ဂလုဲ၊ စုတ်၊ ထောံ(အ်)၊ ပထောံ(အ်)၊ လလုဲ၊ လဝ်၊ ဂိုၚ်။    စွံကၠိုဟ်သၞာံမာန် (v) it will keep right through the year.    စွံစိုတ်ကဵုပြဲမံၚ် (v) make up your mind to be good. [Cf.] ဖျေံစိုတ်။    စွံစိုတ်ဗီုကောန်ဗြဴ (adv) {treat one’s wife} with devotion.

English: Do not go near it or it will charge you.    မၞိဟ်ဏံရိုၚ်ကွေံဟီုအရေဝ်ဟွံရောံဒညကဵုယာဲတ  what a savage he is! he speaks disrespectfully to his parents
Original_Definition: 1 (v) to be wild, to be rude, to be uncouth, untame, savage, uncultivated, coarse, ill-bred, rude, not tight.    ကျာရိုၚ်မံၚ် (v) the wind is wild, it is not air tight.    ဂၠဴရိုၚ်မံၚ်လ္ပအာဗ္ဒာဲဍေံ ဍေံဒိဒး (v) the bull is savage, do not go near it or it will charge you.    မၞိဟ်ဏံရိုၚ်ကွေံဟီုအရေဝ်ဟွံရောံဒညကဵုယာဲတ (v) what a savage he is! He speaks disrespectfully to his parents.

English: Do not go near it or will charge you.    ဍာ်ဒိအာဒယိုၚ်သ္ၚိ  the water came up to the posts of the house.    ပြေၚ်ဒိ  the buffaloes are fighting.  စုက်၊ စုက်ဒး၊ ဇီု၊ တက်ဒး၊ တေက်၊ ဒး၊ လုက်။     ဗဒိ  to fight with horns.    ဒဒိ  to incite to fight
Original_Definition: 1 (v) to hit, to strike against, to touch, to come in contact with, impinge on, collide, to charge, fight with horns.    ဂၠဴဂှ်ရိုၚ်မံၚ်လ္ပအာဗ္ဒာဲဍေံ ဍေံဒိဒး (v) the bull is savage, do not go near it or will charge you.    ဍာ်ဒိအာဒယိုၚ်သ္ၚိ (v) the water came up to the posts of the house.    ပြေၚ်ဒိ (v) the buffaloes are fighting. [Cf] စုက်၊ စုက်ဒး၊ ဇီု(မ်)၊ တက်ဒး၊ တေက်၊ ဒး၊ လုက်။    [Der] ဗဒိ (v) to fight with horns.    ဒဒိ (v) to incite to fight.

English: Do not set yourself up to be better than other people.  ဂၠိၚ်၊ ဒ္တိုန်၊ ပ္တဴ၊ ပ္တိုန်၊ သၠဲ။  သဝ်။     သမၠုၚ်  top.    ဖလှုၚ်  to exalt
